query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS horoscopo_cache (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  signo VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
  data_cache DATE NOT NULL,
  texto_pt TEXT NOT NULL,
  created_at BIGINT NOT NULL,
  UNIQUE KEY unique_signo_data (signo, data_cache)
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user axRHbWZqKReZrAb.b2cf85c9ad94 --database SMgJn6AGQCNfDq7mPzPqc9 --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS horoscopo_cache (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  signo VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
  data_cache DATE NOT NULL,
  texto_pt TEXT NOT NULL,
  created_at BIGINT NOT NULL,
  UNIQUE KEY unique_signo_data (signo, data_cache)
);
